Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$scan = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST 'https://career-os-backend-production.up.railway.app/api/monitor/scan' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{}'
Write-Host 'Scan response:' \(\\$scan | ConvertTo-Json\)

\\$jobs = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://career-os-backend-production.up.railway.app/api/monitor/jobs?sector=india'
Write-Host 'Jobs response status:' \\$jobs.status

\\$djJobs = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://career-os-backend-production.up.railway.app/api/jobs?candidate=dj'
Write-Host 'DJ jobs count:' \\$djJobs.jobs.Count

\\$poojaJobs = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://career-os-backend-production.up.railway.app/api/jobs?candidate=pooja'
Write-Host 'Pooja jobs count:' \\$poojaJobs.jobs.Count

\\$health = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://career-os-backend-production.up.railway.app/health'

" 2>&1)
